items.name: BOSS x NFL Dallas Cowboys Hoodie
items.description:

The full BOSS x NFL collection featuring 22 team designs will be available online and at BOSS retail stores, and at select national and international retailers with 6x exclusive designs available for a limited time in Super NFL Tycoon.
